shlokas.text:
अष्टकवर्ग
स्वाद् अर्कः प्रथमाय बन्धु निधन द्व्याज्ञा तपो द्यूनगो वक्रात्
स्वाद् इव तद्वद् एवरविजाच्छुक्रात् स्मरान्त्यारिषु ।
जीवाद् धर्म सुताय शत्रुषु दश त्र्यायारिगः शीतगोरेष्वेवान्त्य
तपः सुतेषु च बुधाल् लग्नात् स बन्ध्वन्त्यगः
shlokas.english_meaning: The Sun gives auspicious points (Bindus) in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses from itself and Mars; same for Saturn. From Venus, it gives in the 6th, 7th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, it gives in the 5th, 6th, 9th, and 11th houses. From the Moon, it gives in the 3rd, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Mercury, it gives in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Ascendant, it gives in the 3rd, 4th, 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
लग्नात् षट् त्रि दशायगः स धन धी धर्मेषु चाराच्छशी स्वात्
सास्तादिषु साष्ट सप्तसु रवेः षट् त्र्याय धीस्थो यमात् ।
धी त्र्यायाष्टम कण्टकेषु शशिजाज् जीवाद् व्ययायाष्टगः केन्द्रस्थश्च
सितात् तु धर्म सुखधी त्र्यायास्पदानङ्गगः
shlokas.english_meaning: The Moon gives Bindus in the 3rd, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses from the Ascendant; in the 2nd, 5th, and 9th from Mars; in its own 1st, 3rd, 6th, 7th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Sun, it gives in the 3rd, 6th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, it gives in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses. From Mercury, it gives in the 1st, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, it gives in the 1st, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Venus, it gives in the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
वक्रस्तूपचयेष्विनात् स तनयेष्वाद्याधिकेषूदयाच् ।
चन्द्राद् दिग् विफलेषु केन्द्र निधन प्राप्त्यर्थगः स्वाच्छुभः ।
धर्मायाष्टम केन्द्रगोऽर्क तनयाज् ज्ञात् षट् त्रि धी लाभगः ।
शुक्रात् षड् व्यय लाभ म्ऱ्त्युषु गुरोः कर्मान्यलाभारिषु
shlokas.english_meaning: Mars gives Bindus in its own 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses; from the Sun in Upachaya houses (3, 6, 10, 11). From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 3rd, 6th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Moon, in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 1st, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Mercury, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 6th, 8th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, in the 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
द्व्याद्यायाष्ट तपः सुखेषु भृगुजात् स त्र्यात्मजेष्विन्दुजः
साज्ञास्तेषु यमारयोर्व्ययरिपु प्राप्त्यष्टगो वाक् पतेः ।
धर्मायारि सुत व्ययेषु सवितुः स्वात् साद्य कर्म त्रिगः षट्
स्वायाष्ट सुखास्पदेषु हिमगोः साद्येषु लग्नाच्छुभः
shlokas.english_meaning: Mercury gives Bindus from Venus in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, and 11th houses. From itself, in the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Saturn and Mars, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Jupiter, in the 6th, 8th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Sun, in the 5th, 6th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Moon, in the 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
दिक् स्वाद्याष्टमदाय बन्धुषु कुजात् स्वात् त्रिकेष्वङ्गिराः सूर्यात्
सत्रि नवेषु धी स्व नवदिग् लाभारिगो भार्गवात् ।
जायायरथ नवात्मजेषु हिमगोर्मन्दात् त्रि षड् धी व्यये दिग् धी
षट् स्व सुखाय पूर्व नवगो ज्ञात् स स्मरश्च उदयात्
shlokas.english_meaning: Jupiter gives Bindus from Mars in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From itself, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Sun, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 2nd, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Moon, in the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 12th houses. From Mercury, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Ascendant, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th, 7th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses.

shlokas.text:
लग्नाद् आ सुत लाभरन्ध्र नवगः सान्त्यः शशाङ्कात् सितः
स्वात् साज्ञेषु सुख त्रि धी नवदश च्छिद्राप्तिगः सूर्यजात् ।
रन्ध्राय व्यगो रवेर्नवदश प्राप्त्यष्टधीस्थो गुरोर्ज्ञाद्
धी त्र्याय नवारिगस्त्रि नव षट् पुत्रायसान्त्यः कुजात्
shlokas.english_meaning: Venus gives Bindus from the Ascendant in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, and 11th houses. From the Moon, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses. From itself, in the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Saturn, in the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Sun, in the 8th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, in the 5th, 8th, 9th, 10th, and 11th houses. From Mercury, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 9th, and 11th houses. From Mars, in the 3rd, 4th, 6th, 9th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
मन्द स्वात् त्रि सुताय शत्रुषु शुभः साज्ञान्त्यगो भूमिजात्
केन्द्रायाष्टधनेष्विनाद् उपचयेष्वाद्ये सुखे च उदयात् ।
धर्मायारि दशान्त्य मृत्युषु बुधाच्चन्द्रात् त्री षड् लाभगः
षष्ठायान्त्य गतः सितास्सुर गुरोः प्राप्त्यन्त्यधी शत्रुषु
shlokas.english_meaning: Saturn gives Bindus from itself in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, and 11th houses. From Mars, in the 3rd, 5th, 6th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Sun, in the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 7th, 8th, 10th, and 11th houses. From the Ascendant, in Upachaya houses (3, 6, 10, 11) and the 1st and 4th houses. From Mercury, in the 6th, 8th, 9th, 10th, 11th, and 12th houses. From the Moon, in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses. From Venus, in the 6th, 11th, and 12th houses. From Jupiter, in the 5th, 6th, 11th, and 12th houses.

shlokas.text:
इति निगदितम् इष्टं नेष्टम् अन्यद् विशेषाद् अधिक फल विपाकं जन्म भात् तत्रदद्युः ।
उपचय गृह मित्र स्वोच्चगैः पुष्टम् इष्टं अवपचय गृह नीचारातिगैर्नेष्ट सम्पत्
shlokas.english_meaning: Thus are described the auspicious points. Others are inauspicious. Planets give results based on these Bindus when they transit through the natal houses. If a planet is in an Upachaya house, friend's sign, or exaltation, the auspicious results are full; otherwise, inauspicious results prevail.
shlokas.hindi_meaning: इस प्रकार शुभ बिन्दुओं का वर्णन किया गया है। अन्य बिन्दु अशुभ होते हैं। जब ग्रह जन्मकालीन भावों से गोचर करते हैं, तो वे इन बिन्दुओं के आधार पर फल देते हैं। यदि ग्रह उपचय भाव, मित्र राशि या उच्च राशि में हो, तो शुभ फल पूर्ण होते हैं; अन्यथा अशुभ फल प्रधान होते हैं।
